title: 2026-03-31 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 12.21
description: New daily signal for 2026-03-31: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 12.21/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2026-03-31, the score printed 12.21/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
